parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, tenant_name: $json.tenant_name, billing_month: $json.billing_month, plan: $json.plan, currency: $json.currency, calculate_usage: true }) }}

parameters.subject: Kubric Invoice — {{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.billing_month }} — {{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.tenant_name }}
parameters.message:
Kubric Security Platform Invoice

Dear {{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.tenant_name }},

Please find your invoice for {{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.billing_month }} below.

{{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.line_items.map(item => ``).join('') }}
DescriptionAmount ({{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.currency }})
${item.description || item.name || 'Service'}${(item.amount || 0).toFixed(2)}
Subtotal{{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.subtotal.toFixed(2) }}
Tax{{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.tax.toFixed(2) }}
Total Due{{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.total.toFixed(2) }} {{ $('Format Invoice').item.json.currency }}

Payment due: {{ new Date($('Format Invoice').item.json.due_date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) }}

Invoice ID: {{ $json.id || $json.invoice_id || 'Pending' }}

Kubric AI Security Platform | billing@kubric.io

If you have questions about this invoice, please contact your account manager.
